title: Mirabi
summary:
Mirabi (Persian: ميرابي, also Romanized as Mīrābī) is a village in Rudkhaneh Rural District, Rudkhaneh District, Rudan County, Hormozgan Province, Iran. At the 2006 census, its population was 111, in 20 families.
